## Summary

<!-- Brief description of the changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (correction to existing content)
- [ ] New model or threshold
- [ ] New condition guide
- [ ] New language translation
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Metadata / SEO update

## Clinical Accuracy

- [ ] Changes are consistent with the six decision outputs (DECLINE, DEFER, REFER, TRIAL, CONTINUE, DISCHARGE)
- [ ] Changes are supported by clinical evidence (references provided if applicable)
- [ ] No conflicts with existing models or thresholds
- [ ] Cross-references updated if new documents are added

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the existing models and thresholds
- [ ] New condition guides follow the established format (Definition, Red Flags, Hypothesis, Trial, Decision Criteria)
- [ ] Links in README.md, llms.txt, and sitemap.xml updated if new files are added
- [ ] Schema.org hasPart in index.html updated if new documents are added
